description: CompositionGrey checked formal trousers made of 100% cotton, has flat front with two pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back, brand patch above the right hip pocket, metal zipper and button closure, buttoned flaps on the waistband, and reinforced stitch detailing along the crotch area and the hemlineFitSlimWash careMachine wash coldWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry lowWarm ironThe man of substance always chooses his formal trousers with much care, and scullers makes it all the more easier with its classsy range of formal trousers. Designed with the choicest of selected fabrics, it makes for a perfect daily office wear. Pair it with classic formal shirts and leather shoes to look every bit like the corporate that you are.Model statisticsThe product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and shoulder 18"
